description_long: This is a compact electronic keyboard with a rectangular body featuring a light blue top panel and deep pink sides and base. The keyboard has six large white keys and three black keys, arranged in a simplified piano-style layout. The top panel includes a central digital display, surrounded by various control knobs, buttons, and sliders, suggesting functionality for sound modulation and effects. The control interface is symmetrically arranged, with two large rotary knobs, several smaller buttons, and a few square pads, all in black and white. The overall design is modern and playful, with bold color contrasts and a clean, uncluttered appearance. This keyboard is likely intended for portable use, suitable for street performances, music workshops, or urban recreational spaces.
description: A compact, modern electronic keyboard with a blue top, pink sides, and a simplified set of piano keys, featuring a digital display and multiple control knobs and buttons.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the keyboard, the sloped control panel, and the arrangement of keys and controls.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full set of keys, the central display, and the symmetrical layout of knobs and buttons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the sloped panel and the side profile of the keys and controls.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back panel, with the control interface and keys partially visible from behind.
